projects.title: Hallucinate Visualizer
projects.description: Custom-built motion graphics for the debut of DJAL’s 'Hallucinate' while opening for Wuki. Built with After Effects for timed motion and Premiere Pro for final synchronization.

projects.title: DJAL Backdrop
projects.description: To solidify DJAL’s visual brand during his opening set for Wuki at Hawaiian Brian’s, I developed a stage backdrop featuring his custom signature typography. Using After Effects, I animated the custom font to pulse and breathe with the track's sub-bass, creating a constant brand presence that cut through the strobe lights. The final composition was refined in Premiere Pro to ensure the looping animations felt seamless and high-energy throughout his debut performance.
